page-title.purpose: Page headers (Leads, Heute). One per page; the type ceiling.

title.purpose: Row-level emphasis: lead names, card headers.

body.purpose: Default UI and prose text; prose capped 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Table column headers and field labels. The only uppercase-tracked use.

data.purpose: IBM Plex Mono, tabular numerals: dates, counts, emails, IDs, follow-ups. The console's signature.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Lift true overlays (dropdown, popover, dialog, command palette) off the page. Dark mode uses /0.55.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus indicator. Load-bearing: the console is keyboard-forward.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. Exponential ease-out, no bounce.

motion.name: dur-base
motion.purpose: Selection, panel/disclosure transitions. Ceiling for in-flow UI.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Below: collapse the lead table to a stacked row layout; nav becomes a compact menu.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Above: full table density, all columns visible.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single main action per view (e.g. Neuer Lead). Filled Console Indigo, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: oklch(0.50 0.17 245); border: none; border-radius: 3px; padding: 6px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.45 0.17 245); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.50 0.17 245); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.41 0.17 245); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default for most actions (e.g. CSV-Import). Surface fill, hairline border, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.24 0.012 245); background: oklch(0.975 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0 0); border-radius: 3px; padding: 6px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.945 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.50 0.17 245); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Status Tag
components.description: Pipeline state indicator. Small squared tag (not a pill), pale tint bg + saturated status-hue text. Shown here: Gewonnen / won.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.43 0.13 150); background: oklch(0.95 0.04 150); border-radius: 2px; padding: 1px 6px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Text/select field. Hairline border, 3px radius, accent border + ring on focus, never-faint placeholder.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Suche Name, E-Mail, Firma…" />
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.24 0.012 245); background: #fff; border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0 0); border-radius: 3px; padding: 6px 10px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.47 0.012 245); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.50 0.17 245); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.50 0.17 245); }

components.name: Lead Table Row
components.description: The signature surface. Dense ~28px row; lead name in Title sans, all data columns in mono with tabular numerals; hairline divider, no zebra, hover = surface-sunken.
components.html:
NameE-MailLast TouchWiedervorlage
Mara Vogtmara@vogt.io16.06.2026 09:1214.06.2026
Jonas Reicherj.reicher@acme.co17.06.2026 18:40—
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: oklch(0.975 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0 0); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; text-align: left; } .ds-table thead { background: oklch(0.945 0 0); } .ds-table th { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.47 0.012 245); padding: 6px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0 0); } .ds-table td { padding: 6px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.93 0 0); } .ds-table tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: oklch(0.945 0 0); } .ds-cell-name { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.24 0.012 245); } .ds-cell-data { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1; color: oklch(0.24 0.012 245); } .ds-muted { color: oklch(0.47 0.012 245); } .ds-overdue { color: oklch(0.50 0.18 25); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Top bar: wordmark + links. Muted default, ink hover, active = ink + 600 + 2px accent underline (the only place nav touches the accent).
components.html: b-leadsHeuteLeadsNeuer Lead
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; background: oklch(0.975 0 0); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0 0); padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-wordmark { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.24 0.012 245); margin-right: 8px; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.47 0.012 245); text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 2px; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.24 0.012 245); } .ds-nav-link.ds-active { color: oklch(0.24 0.012 245); font-weight: 600; border-bottom: 2px solid oklch(0.50 0.17 245); }

narrative.overview: b-leads is a single-person cockpit for running cold outreach. It is not a product being sold; it is a workbench the operator returns to every day to scan the state of every lead, act on the right ones, and never lose an overdue follow-up. The whole system optimizes for one thing: the operator reads dense information and acts fast. Density is the point, not a compromise. The visual language is a quiet technical console: a flat, layered neutral surface; proportional sans for labels and prose; and a monospace data layer that carries everything scanned and compared down a column. Color is rationed: an indigo accent on interaction only, six semantic hues on pipeline state only. The system is system-adaptive: a dark console for focused and evening sessions, a pure-white data-desk for bright daytime work.
keyCharacteristics: Flat, tonally-layered neutral surface; depth by border and tone, not shadow.
Monospace tabular numerals for all scanned/compared data.
A single rationed indigo accent for interaction; six semantic hues for state.
Tight density: 14px body, ~28px table rows, small squared status tags.
Dual-mode (dark + light), adapting to ambient light.

rules.name: The Rationed Accent Rule
rules.body: Console Indigo is interaction, full stop. If it appears on something the operator cannot click, focus, or select, it is wrong. Target <=10% of any screen.

rules.name: The Two Vocabularies Rule
rules.body: Interaction color (indigo) and state color (the six status hues) are separate languages and never overlap. The accent is never a status; a status hue is never an action.

rules.name: The Meaning-Only Color Rule
rules.body: Neutrals carry all structure. A pixel is colored only if the color means something (interaction or state). Decorative color is forbidden.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Data Rule
rules.body: If a value is scanned down a column or compared between rows (date, count, email, ID, currency), it is set in IBM Plex Mono with tabular numerals. Prose and labels are Plex Sans.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Type sizes are fixed rem, never fluid clamp(). The operator views at a consistent DPI.

rules.name: The Flat-Console Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces are flat. Shadows belong only to things floating above the page (overlays) and to focus.

dos: Do set every scanned/compared value (dates, counts, emails, IDs, follow-ups) in IBM Plex Mono with tabular numerals.
Do keep Console Indigo for interaction only - primary action, selection, focus, active nav, links - at <=10% of any screen.
Do convey depth with tone (bg -> surface -> surface-sunken) and 1px borders; keep resting surfaces flat.
Do pair every status/urgency color with weight or a text label, so state reads without relying on hue.
Do keep body text at the ink end of the ramp; verify >=4.5:1, including placeholders and muted text.
Do ship every interactive component with default, hover, focus-visible, active, and disabled states, and a visible accent focus ring.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion with an instant/crossfade fallback; keep state transitions at 150-250ms.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard: no hero-metric cards, no gradient accents, no identical icon-heading-text card grids, no marketing chrome.
Don't build a heavy enterprise CRM: no cluttered toolbars, tabs-within-tabs, or everything-at-once panels.
Don't go toy: no playful rounded-everything, illustrations, or bounce/elastic motion.
Don't use the indigo accent to express pipeline state, and don't use a status hue for an action.
Don't put shadows on resting cards, rows, panels, or buttons. Shadows are for overlays and focus only.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text, background-clip: text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't set data in proportional sans or prose in mono; don't use fluid clamp() type sizes.
Don't revert to undifferentiated default-Tailwind gray (bg-gray-50 / text-gray-900 with no tokens).
